name: American Integrity Insurance Group, Inc.
summary: American Integrity Insurance Group, Inc. is a property and casualty insurance company conducting substantially all of its business in Florida. The company writes homeowners insurance policies, pursues Citizens Property Insurance Corporation take-out opportunities, and distributes through independent insurance agents, homebuilder-affiliated agents, and national insurance carriers. It relies on reinsurance coverage and maintains claims management operations.
